name: blendshape_solver_v1
training_data_summary: Synthetic. 10,000 training + 1,000 validation samples drawn from a canonical neutral 76-point landmark face perturbed along plausible expression axes (jaw open, smile/frown, eye blink, brow raise) plus per-point Gaussian jitter (std 0.001). Each sample is labelled with the same geometric rules implemented in Sources/MirrorMeshSolver/GeometricSolver.swift, so the model learns to mimic the geometric solver in a differentiable form. No human face data is used. No identifiable biometric data is touched.
architecture: MLP: Linear(152, 64) -> ReLU -> Linear(64, 64) -> ReLU -> Linear(64, 52) -> Sigmoid
input_schema: Float32 tensor of shape (1, 152). 76 landmark points as interleaved (x, y) in normalized image space [0, 1].
output_schema: Float32 tensor of shape (1, 52). Coefficients in [0, 1] ordered by BlendshapeKey.allCases sorted ascending by rawValue.
sha256_algorithm: Concatenated sha256 over each file in the .mlpackage directory, sorted by relative path. Each file's relative-path bytes are written, then a NUL byte, then the file contents. Implemented in models/training/blendshape_solver.py:sha256_of_path and verifiable via models/verify_provenance.py.
reproduction: python3 -m pip install -r models/training/requirements.txt && python3 models/training/blendshape_solver.py
